markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Andrew McCutchen is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.

If Andrew McCutchen is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Isiah Kiner-Falefa is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Gavin Sheets is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Gavin Sheets starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Gavin Sheets is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Gavin Sheets is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
